name: Special City Council Closed Session
summary:
• Special closed-session City Council meeting for Laguna Beach on June 11, 2026 at 2:00 PM; no regular business will be considered.
  • Labor negotiations will be discussed with the Police Employees’ Association and Municipal Employees’ Association.
  • Multiple real estate negotiations are on the agenda, including 650C Laguna Canyon Road and several APNs involving Merrick & Mary Lynn Leckey.
  • Potential litigation will be addressed regarding a First Amendment challenge to the Forest Avenue Promenade regulations.
  • Public participation and remote viewing are available, but written comments had to be submitted by the prior business day and will not be read aloud.

name: Design Review Board
summary:
• Design Review Board meeting focus: The agenda centers on public comment, consent items, and several regular business development applications, with most items involving design review and coastal development permits.
  • Key potential approvals/continuances: Staff recommends continuing the ADU setback variance at 2885 Rounsevel Terrace to July 23, 2026, while several other projects are recommended for approval.
  • 341 Holly Street: Proposed attached ADU plus variance for a nonconforming residence and parking deficiency; staff recommends approval and CEQA categorical exemption.
  • 954 Rembrandt Drive: Modifications to a home under construction include new deck and habitable-space changes; staff recommends approval and CEQA categorical exemption.
  • 1375 Circle Way and 31461 Coast Hwy: Both involve additions/modifications to existing single-family residences with coastal development permits; staff recommends approval, with 1375 Circle Way noted as in an appealable coastal zone area.
seo_text: 1. CALL TO ORDER 2. PUBLIC COMMUNICATIONS - At this time, members of the public may address the Design Review Board regarding any items not on the agenda but within the subject matter jurisdiction of the Design Review Board. No action may be taken on off-agenda items unless authorized by law. Comments shall be limited to three (3) minutes each and fifteen (15) minutes for all comments, unless extended for good cause by the Design Review Board. 3. MODIFICATION OF AGENDA ORDER 4. CONSENT CALENDAR

name: Heritage Committee - CANCELED
summary:
• Meeting canceled: The City of Laguna Beach Heritage Committee meeting scheduled for June 15, 2025 was canceled.
  • Next meeting scheduled: The next regular Heritage Committee meeting is set for July 20, 2025 at 6:00 PM.
  • Accessibility notice: ADA accommodations are available through the City Clerk with 48 hours’ advance notice.
seo_text: THIS JUNE 15, 2025, MEETING HAS BEEN CANCELED. THE NEXT REGULAR HERITAGE COMMITTEE MEETING IS SCHEDULED FOR JULY 20, 2025, AT 6:00 PM.
